_publications._publicationTitle: Performance Evaluation of SpliceAI for the Prediction of Splicing of

_contextSnippet: Based on this analysis, the optimal cut-off was determined to be >0.22 with an area under the ROC curve (AUC) of 0.975 (p < 0.0001, area = 0.5).
details: Optimal cut-off value determined to be >0.22 with AUC of 0.975 (p < 0.0001)
